features: 🥄 SUPERIOR QUALITY - JJPRIME's 6 pieces dessert spoons are crafted with strong stainless steel and finish by smoothly polished. The structure is durable and rust proof, you can reuse it for years without worrying.

🥄 LONG HANDLED SPOONS - Our long spoons is an immediate and convenient solution for you. With the length of spoon approximately 18cm, you can reach the bottom of jars or tall mugs easily and no more dropping regular teaspoons spoon now.

🥄 DISHWASHER SAFE - These desert spoons cutlery is easy to clean, safe for dishwashing and sterilizing. Even being being washed several times, they still remain shiny. (Avoid strong alkaline, highly acidic or strong oxidizing cleanser)

🥄 WIDE APPLICATION - The long handled spoon is perfect for eating ice-cream or sundae, pastry, cake or desserts. It is also great for stirring sugar or other sweeteners into iced tea which is traditionally served in a tall glass.
🥄 SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - Based on the confidence in the quality, our long dessert spoon set is protected by worry-free support. Customer's satisfaction is our top priority.
description: The spoon set consists of 6 elegant long handled spoons. The spoons are made from a high quality stainless steel, designed to be long lasting and rust resistant. The spoons are also dishwasher safe making them easy to clean. The long handled spoons have numerous uses such as eating Ice cream sundaes, making lattes, frappuccino's and even cocktail's or can simply be used as an elegant serving spoon. Also Ideal for reaching all the way to the bottom of the tallest latte cup or Sundae dish. The premium quality long handled spoons are for all occasions when a normal spoon is just not long enough. You will receive: 6 x stainless steel long handle spoons.
